keyEvents.text: Substitution, St. Kitts And Nevis. Kalonji Clarke replaces Gvaune Amory.
Yohannes Mitchum (St. Kitts And Nevis) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Saint Lucia 1, St. Kitts And Nevis 0. Gregson President (Saint Lucia) left footed shot from the right side of the box to the bottom left corner.
Substitution, St. Kitts And Nevis. Kimaree Rogers replaces Steve Archibald because of an injury.
Mervin Lewis (St. Kitts And Nevis) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
